metric_rollups.content_kind_inclusion_rule: youtube Shorts admitted into the fragrance transcript-bearing source pool only
limitations: Rollup covers the admitted fragrance Shorts pool only; it is not a channel-wide average.
Metrics are recaptured from live YouTube watch packets and are capture-time observations that may change after capture.
Engagement rate is unavailable because no admitted Short exposed view, like, and total-comment counts together in the live watch packets.
Cross-platform rollups are not authorized without promoted public-handle linkage evidence.
Average/median views are computed over 5 admitted Shorts (10 metric observations in total); sample adequacy is stronger_admitted_pool_n_8_plus and the value is not a representative creator average.
The admitted pool is fragrance and transcript-bearing, so selection can bias view averages relative to the creator's full Shorts or channel output.

average_comment_count.posture_reason_or_none: no admitted Short exposed a source-visible total_comment_count in the live watch packets

engagement_rate.posture_reason_or_none: no admitted Short exposed view, like, and total-comment counts together in the live watch packets

metric_rollups.rollup_window_description: admitted_fragrance_shorts_pool200_v0 recaptured from live watch packets; not a full creator-channel window

metric_rollups.content_kind_inclusion_rule: youtube Shorts admitted into the fragrance transcript-bearing source pool only
limitations: Rollup covers the admitted fragrance Shorts pool only; it is not a channel-wide average.
Metrics are recaptured from live YouTube watch packets and are capture-time observations that may change after capture.
Engagement rate is unavailable because no admitted Short exposed view, like, and total-comment counts together in the live watch packets.
Cross-platform rollups are not authorized without promoted public-handle linkage evidence.
Average/median views are computed over 9 admitted Shorts (18 metric observations in total); sample adequacy is stronger_admitted_pool_n_8_plus and the value is not a representative creator average.
The admitted pool is fragrance and transcript-bearing, so selection can bias view averages relative to the creator's full Shorts or channel output.

average_comment_count.posture_reason_or_none: no admitted Short exposed a source-visible total_comment_count in the live watch packets

engagement_rate.posture_reason_or_none: no admitted Short exposed view, like, and total-comment counts together in the live watch packets
